---
title: "<i>St. Nicholas</i>"
---

## <i>St. Nicholas</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

An American magazine for children, it ran 1873-1941.  CMY wanted <i>The Release </i>to be published in it, but this does not seem to have happened.  Louisa May Alcott, ‘Pansies’ <i>St. Nicholas</i> 15 (November 1887) has a girl say: ‘” I love dear Miss Yonge and her books, with their nice, large families, and their trials, and their pious ways, and pleasant homes full of brothers and sisters, and good fathers and mothers.   I'm never tired of them, and have read 'Daisy Chain' nine times at least.”’

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
